review_title: Work pace is slow at my team
review_body_text: Was placed in a consumer banking team, which I find quite it quite chilling when I was looking for a more intense role. However, boss was very kind and always help to guide me
Opportunity to learn a lot however i was hired as a outsourcing staff. My teammate are amazing, but the manager I am under eventually started micromanaging.

What is the best part of working at the company? The best experience work under cimb bank What is the most stressful part about working at the company? When system breakdown.. customer complaints What is the work environment and culture like at the company? Working hours Environment Facilities What is a typical day like for you at the company? On Weekends a lot of customer and want the day of salary

Im an intern (3 months) i could give an overall of 3 stars. Enhance the communication skills where most of the colleagues in my team are much older in the range of 40-50. The working enviroment and working hours are much flexible where only need to onsite at least 2days and wfh the other day. Allowance rm1.5k exclude the epf deduction (i wondered is this necessary). Can go buy food or snacks anytime. I think that so much for the pros. Things that really make me feel boring and not enjoying my internship is because i have been assigned to the department/division that is not even 50% related to what i studied and what really sad is they lied on the jobscope (where i accept the offer due to the jobscope provided). Overall, i could say this internship with cimb somehow dont give me any experience that is tightly related to my area of study. I really losing hope. It just a waste of the skills i gain from i studied. Theres no proper training and new exposure in my field of study.

I work for almost 15 years before early retirement. Good Culture, good environment and supportive management. The con is being once scolded by Taxi Driver who send me to HQ -KL just because it links to previous PM who being charged for corruption.

review_title: Good place to gain experience but no work life balance
review_body_text: This is a good place for startup, to gain experience. To me its a fast pace environment where u need to learn to multitask. Staff benefit very good. But no Work life balance.

Provide employees with flexible work arrangements, such as telecommuting and compressed workweeks. Offer employees paid time off for vacation, sick leave, and personal days. Provide employees with access to a gym, fitness classes, or other wellness programs. Create a break room or lounge area where employees can relax and socialize. Organize social events and team-building activities, such as happy hours, potlucks, and outings.
- Branch management by the manager is not fair and professional. Stressfull management. Good HR organization. Can work if manage to balance the lifestyle
People is kind and helpful, pace could be slow at times but you have to be proactive to maximize your learning experience. The allowance is acceptable, it could be higher.

review_title: good place to grow your career
review_body_text: medical benefit is good enough incentive is not good enough self motivated is compulsory to survive dont ask or hope for support from the bosses good collegue

review_title: Fun workplace and good work environment
review_body_text: Learn a lot here, best place to internship as fresh graduate, hybrid working, team members were nice and helpful, no pressure from supervisor and high allowance for internshio

Been working here after so long. Years after years, more heavy workload and become more stressful environment with higher target, but when it come to salary increment and bonus, it was not in line with your heavy workload.

The team I interned for were very friendly and I learned many things from them. Although the work was great, they do somewhat expect some level of expertise (at least in the department I was in) even if you were only an intern.

Learn something but it is not much. Typically like intern. More physical work to manage in operation and when time to check data, then keyin data in system. Basically depend which department you're assign to.
Overall is good and free environment but need to achieve sales target. It’s is good if u enjoy flexible time and flexible working hours and commission based alert.

Learn a lot of things here, the place is fun and you can get a lot of experience here. If u did well they may ask you to handle some project. The hardesr part of the job is probably communication as you will need to attend a lot of meetings sometimes the meeting will clash with each other.

review_title: Best place to learn and grow
review_body_text: Best place to learn and grow especially if you are fresh graduates. Might not be suitable for those who strive for work-life balance and family-oriented person.

review_title: high salary, good trainning and peovide non financial reward
review_body_text: i love cimb because they have good health insurance , they also provide as a good trainning as sustainability and 3D academic , they also reward with a trip and holiday

> you have to prepare AC for ur bosses/seniors > long working hours ( BANKING INDUSTRY) > no WFH > cannot make even a single mistake even you're new if you do then, you will be famous of gossip about you > toxic workplace
Good company to learn management, sales skill, preparation memo, build relationship with branch manager and head, open for discussion. Develop new project.
